title: phacelia sericea var. biennis
intro: Phacelia sericea var. biennis is a biennial or perennial plant, commonly referred to as a silverleaf phacelia, which is a member of the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phacelia sericea var. biennis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, and its leaves can also be used in topical applications for skin irritations.
